title: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing, in so far as it | Marcus Aurelius
description:
You can't choreograph life, but you can train to absorb its hits and stay on your feet. What threw you off balance this week?

#stoicism #marcusaurelius #adversity #resilience #meditations #mentaltoughness #stoicwisdom #mindset #selfdiscipline #dailystoic
quote: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing, in so far as it stands ready against the sudden and unforeseen.
author: Marcus Aurelius
